description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden chest of drawers with a rectangular shape and a slightly overhanging top surface. The wood has a dark, weathered finish with visible grain patterns and some surface blemishes, giving it a rustic, aged appearance. The top of the chest is lighter in color and appears to have some wear marks or stains. There are three drawers, each equipped with a metallic bar pull handle, and the drawers are partially open, revealing a spacious interior. The sides and front panels are framed with simple, recessed borders, adding a subtle decorative touch. The chest stands on small, blocky feet, elevating it slightly off the ground.
description: A rustic, dark wooden chest of drawers with three drawers and metallic bar pull handles, featuring a weathered top and simple recessed paneling.
description_view_0: Left side view showing two drawers partially open and the side panel's wood grain.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel and the overhanging top.
description_view_2: Right side view with two drawers partially open, mirroring the left side's features.
description_view_3: Front view showing all three drawers, two of which are open, and the metallic bar pull handles.
